personalization_tips: Customize outreach based on company size, industry, and specific pain points.
Include role-specific messaging to increase relevance.
targeting_improvements: Prioritize leads with verified contacts and emails.
Focus on companies with active engagement in relevant industry events.
Improve data collection to include contact roles and specific challenges.

retrospective.summary: This run demonstrated some progress in lead generation and trend detection but remains hampered by low trend specificity, coherence issues, and limited source relevance. Despite planned improvements, the system still struggles with generating actionable, industry-specific insights and lacks sufficient contact data for effective outreach. Overall, the run shows incremental gains but falls short of expectations for high-quality, targeted outputs, indicating the need for more robust source and trend refinement.
successes: Generated 44 leads, indicating some outreach activity was maintained.
Detected 14 trends, showing the system's ability to identify emerging topics.
Mean KB hit rate of 82.3% suggests good source coverage and retrieval efficiency.
failures: Trends had very low OSS and coherence scores, making them vague and less actionable, likely due to inadequate clustering and filtering.
Lack of industry context and recent company news integration limited trend relevance and specificity.
Absence of contact details hindered effective engagement, despite high confidence scores.

improvement_plan.action: Integrate industry-specific and recent company news data to improve trend relevance and specificity.
improvement_plan.expected_impact: Generate more targeted, actionable trends for outreach.

improvement_plan.action: Implement real-time source relevance scoring with adaptive algorithms to dynamically prioritize high-quality, timely sources.
improvement_plan.expected_impact: Increase trend relevance and data freshness, leading to more actionable insights.

improvement_plan.action: Refine clustering techniques, possibly incorporating supervised methods to improve trend coherence.
